recipe.title: Hot-smoked salmon pasta
recipe.description: Fresh, delicious and on the table in less than 15 minutes, this 5-ingredient pasta recipe will take care of you. The perfect for a midweek dinner for 4.

steps.descr: Use a speed-peeler to strip the top tender half of the...
steps.instructions: Use a speed-peeler to strip the top tender half of the asparagus stalks into ribbons.

on_enter.say: Use a speed-peeler to strip the top tender half of the asparagus stalks into ribbons.

steps.descr: Finely slice the remaining stalks, discarding the woody ends
steps.instructions: Finely slice the remaining stalks, discarding the woody ends.

on_enter.say: Finely slice the remaining stalks, discarding the woody ends.

steps.descr: Cook the pasta in a pan of boiling salted water...
steps.instructions: Cook the pasta in a pan of boiling salted water according to the packet instructions, then drain, reserving a mugful of cooking water.

on_enter.say: Cook the pasta in a pan of boiling salted water according to the packet instructions, then drain, reserving a mugful of cooking water.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, roughly break the salmon into a large...
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, roughly break the salmon into a large non-stick frying pan on a medium-high heat.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, roughly break the salmon into a large non-stick frying pan on a medium-high heat.

steps.descr: Add the sliced asparagus stalks, and toss occasionally...
steps.instructions: Add the sliced asparagus stalks, and toss occasionally until the pasta’s ready.

on_enter.say: Add the sliced asparagus stalks, and toss occasionally until the pasta’s ready.

steps.descr: Finely grate half the lemon zest into the salmon pan,...
steps.instructions: Finely grate half the lemon zest into the salmon pan, squeeze in half the juice, then toss in the drained pasta, a good splash of reserved cooking water and the crème fraîche.

on_enter.say: Finely grate half the lemon zest into the salmon pan, squeeze in half the juice, then toss in the drained pasta, a good splash of reserved cooking water and the crème fraîche.

steps.descr: Add the asparagus ribbons, toss again, then season to...
steps.instructions: Add the asparagus ribbons, toss again, then season to perfection with sea salt and black pepper. Serve with lemon wedges, for squeezing over.

on_enter.say: Add the asparagus ribbons, toss again, then season to perfection with sea salt and black pepper. Serve with lemon wedges, for squeezing over.
